subject: (no subject)
body:
I tried to call.. don't torture yourself,, if you are
unhappy there    leave asap  .. new york , prague,, 
do you need help arranging the tickets?  don't stay !!
it makes you more unhappy,,you know that  there are
other ,, more fun, ways to punish yourself
